title: Build Kanban Board Data Model
description: Create the data model for the Kanban board: Board, Column, Card structs. Implement Codable for persistence, Identifiable for SwiftUI lists. Support card properties like title, description, status, labels, and timestamps. Use observable patterns for real-time updates.
acceptance_criteria: Card model with all needed properties
Models are Codable for JSON persistence
agent_output: Implemented complete Kanban board data model following existing project patterns. Created three core models: `KanbanCard` (struct with title, description, status, labels, priority, timestamps, assignee, ticketRef), `KanbanColumn` (struct with cards array and WIP limits), and `KanbanBoard` (ObservableObject class with thread-safe mutations via serial DispatchQueue). All structs are Codable for JSON persistence. Board exposes `@Published columns` for SwiftUI binding and a Combine `cardEvents` publisher for fine-grained event tracking. Thread safety achieved through serial queue + main thread dispatch pattern matching ShellSession.swift conventions.
